name: Clarid Compliance Checker MCP Server
what_it_does: Official MCP server from Clarid AI (clarid-ai org) for checking bank and credit union marketing materials against US financial regulations including FDIC, NCUA, TILA, Reg DD, Reg Z, UDAAP, and Equal Housing requirements. Enables AI agents to validate financial marketing content for regulatory compliance before publication.
use_cases: Checking bank marketing copy for FDIC/NCUA compliance from content review agents
Validating loan advertising against Reg Z and TILA requirements from compliance agents
Reviewing credit union materials for UDAAP compliance from regulatory agents
Automating compliance review workflows for financial institution marketing teams
not_for: Non-financial industry compliance (healthcare, securities — different regulations)
Legal advice — compliance checking tools are not a substitute for counsel
International financial regulations (US-focused: FDIC, NCUA, Federal Reserve regs)
best_when: A bank, credit union, or fintech marketing team needs AI agents to flag potential regulatory compliance issues in marketing materials before publication — automating a review step that traditionally requires compliance officer review.
avoid_when: You need definitive legal compliance determinations. AI compliance checking is a screening tool, not a legal opinion. Always have final review by a licensed compliance officer.

auth.notes: Clarid AI API key required. Sign up at clarid.ai for access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier likely available for evaluation; check clarid.ai for current pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Usage-based for production compliance checking volume
pricing.notes: Startup-stage service targeting financial institutions. Pricing model evolving — verify at clarid.ai.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply; check documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Regulatory compliance in banking is high-stakes — AI screening is a tool, not a legal determination
AI compliance checking can have false positives/negatives — always maintain human review for final decisions
Early-stage startup (clarid-ai) — verify regulatory coverage is current before production deployment
US regulations only (FDIC, NCUA, Fed regs) — not suitable for international financial compliance
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Financial marketing content is sensitive. API key auth. HTTPS. Content submitted to Clarid AI for analysis — review data retention policies for regulatory content.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial content sent to third-party AI service. API key auth. Review data handling for NDA/regulatory content.
